label: malformed_json
note: Garbage inside braces — not valid JSON

label: special_chars
note: Special characters only — not valid JSON

label: object_bare_value
note: Brace with a bare value, no key — not valid JSON

label: trailing_comma
note: Trailing comma — invalid JSON, common mistake

label: single_quotes
note: Single quotes instead of double — invalid JSON

label: wrong_root_array
note: Array as root when an object is expected

label: plain_string
note: String as root when an object is expected

label: number_root
note: Bare number as root when an object is expected

label: boolean_root
note: Bare boolean as root when an object is expected

label: empty_object
note: Valid JSON but missing all required fields

label: duplicate_keys
note: Duplicate keys in body — parses (last wins); tests handling
